title: (YTPMV) Toadsworth Screaming in the Sewers
description:
This video is a collaboration between TheEpicROB (audio) and myself (visuals).
Please be sure to check out his channel here:
https://www.youtube.com/user/TheEpicROB

Original Song: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (NES) - Stage 1
Original Source: Super Mario Sunshine and multiple other games starring Toadsworth

A little history here: Rob made the audio for this 5-6 years ago, brought up the idea of us collabing on it over a year ago, which I sat on until a couple days ago. Toadsworth is finally free to scream. YTP in 2019.

All visuals and audio were done in Sony Vegas.

-2019 YTPMVs so far-
Toadsworth Screaming in the Sewers (Collab with TheEpicROB)
